title: spiraea rosthornii
intro: Spiraea rosthornii, also known as Rosthorn's meadowsweet, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit inflammatory responses and reduce fever, making it a useful treatment for conditions such as arthritis and colds. The health benefits of Spiraea rosthornii include its antiseptic and antispasmodic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and relieve respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Spiraea rosthornii include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
